reasoning: Gukesh dropped to #11 in the October 2025 FIDE rating list with a rating of 2752, after a poor showing in the FIDE Grand Swiss where he lost 15 points. He narrowly sits above Nodirbek Abdusattorov (2750), while trailing Wei Yi (2754), Vincent Keymer (2755), and Wesley So (2756). Because his standing is extremely marginal at Rank 11, even a single game played by him or his adjacent competitors could flip his ranking above or below 11. Given his recent poor form and the fact that an inactive or average month could easily allow Nodirbek to overtake him, there is slightly more downside risk pushing his rank to #12 or below in the immediate short term. For November 2 and November 25, the Nov rating list will be the reference, making his prospects sub-50% due to downward momentum and proximity to the next lowest player. In accordance with the uncertainty increasing over longer horizons, the January 2026 forecast pulls closer to the 50% baseline as mean reversion could see him regain his top form.
